title: Your knowledge for the open pool
intro: Share your craft knowledge with the community. A master reviews every contribution before it is published — nothing goes out unchecked.
unconfigured: The contribution service is not configured in this environment. The rest of the app keeps working as usual.

login.title: Sign in with an email link
login.hint: No password needed: you'll get a sign-in link by email. One click and you're in.
login.sent: Link sent — check your inbox and click the sign-in link. You'll land right back here.
login.error: The link could not be sent. Check the address and try again.

form.bodyPlaceholder: Describe your knowledge the way you would explain it to an apprentice …
form.sourcesHint: At least one source: book, standard, master class, your own workshop practice — as long as it's traceable.
form.licenseLabel: I release my contribution under CC BY-SA 4.0.
form.licenseText: You release your knowledge under CC BY-SA 4.0 — it stays open for everyone.

thanks.title: Thank you for your contribution!
thanks.body: Your knowledge has been received. A master will review it — once approved, it appears in the open knowledge pool.

errors.auth: Your sign-in has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.validation: Please check your input — a field is incomplete or invalid.
errors.server: The contribution could not be saved right now. Please try again later.
